title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Amazon is already offering new OpenAI products on AWS
summary: A day after OpenAI got Microsoft to agree to end exclusive rights, AWS announced a slate of OpenAI model offerings, including a new agent service.

title: RedStone launches settlement layer to address RWA liquidity gap in DeFi lending
summary: A new system targets the mismatch between fast DeFi liquidations and slow asset redemptions, a key barrier to the use of tokenized assets in lending markets.

title: Google expands Pentagon’s access to its AI after Anthropic’s refusal
summary: After Anthropic refused to allow the DoD to use its AI for domestic mass surveillance and autonomous weapons, Google has signed a new contract with the department.

title: Aave, Compound Unveil Technical Plan to Address Fallout From $290M Kelp DAO Hack
summary: Major DeFi protocols outlined technical steps to eliminate bad debt and restore full backing for exploited rsETH tokens.

title: Crypto projects shut down as token models fail under pressure
summary: Crypto projects are shutting down as token funding weakens and fragmented structures leave them with limited options to restructure or recover.

title: Ondo brings proxy voting to tokenized stocks and ETFs with Broadridge
summary: Tokenized stock holders can now participate in corporate governance, closing a long-standing gap between onchain securities and their traditional counterparts.

title: OpenAI Fell Short of Its Own Targets as Compute Costs Piled Up: Report
summary: Internal stumbles over ChatGPT growth and a looming IPO are putting Sam Altman's spend-everything compute strategy under the microscope.

title: OKX lets institutions use BlackRock’s BUIDL fund as trading collateral
summary: OKX integrates BlackRock’s tokenized Treasury fund into Standard Chartered custody, allowing institutions to use it as regulated trading collateral.

title: Elon Musk’s Fight With Colorado Over AI Law Hits Pause as State Considers Revisions
summary: The joint motion halts deadlines and enforcement in xAI’s lawsuit while Colorado lawmakers weigh changes to the state’s AI bias law.

title: OpenAI Is Building Its Own Smartphone Chip With Qualcomm and MediaTek: Report
summary: Six weeks after telling staff to stop chasing distractions, OpenAI is reportedly planning a phone targeting 400 million units a year.

title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
summary: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft gets more cash in a revenue-share agreement.
